creator: remko@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->closed

This had been discussed extensively on the various mailinglists we have. 
We cannot fix this at the moment and I am unsure whether it will be 
fixed in the near future. To make sure we do not have 20 PR's about 
exactly the same i will close this one. Thanks for the willingness to 
improve FreeBSD
